message:
Standardize error handling across CLI commands

Apply consistent error handling patterns across all CLI command modules:

- collections.ts: Align error response handling
- help.ts: Improve help text formatting
- list.ts: Consistent API error extraction
- notes.ts: Standardize error messages
- save.ts: Match error handling patterns
- search.ts: Consistent response parsing
- sync.ts: Align with other commands

These changes ensure all commands provide consistent user-facing error
messages and properly handle the unified API response envelope format.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
